title: Official Information Act requests - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā tono Official Information Act

## Official Information Act requests
Find out how to make a request, and see our responses to requests under the Official Information Act.
Topics are not available in this section
- Te whakarite i tētahi tono pārongo ōkawa Making an official information request Learn about official information and making requests under the Official Information Act 1982.
Learn about official information and making requests under the Official Information Act 1982.
- Ngā urupare pāpāho, Official Information Act hoki Responding to Official Information Act requests from the media Learn about our OIA responsibilities when responding to requests from the media.
Learn about our OIA responsibilities when responding to requests from the media.
- Ngā urupare ki ngā tono Official Information Act Responses to Official Information Act requests Responses to Official Information Act (OIA) requests that have substantive information and are of public interest.
Responses to Official Information Act (OIA) requests that have substantive information and are of public interest.
